title: KIDS IN TRANSITION TO SCHOOL - 211info
text: THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER KIDS IN TRANSITION TO SCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a summer program that helps children and families prepare for kindergarten. 1310 S 8th Street Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Ages 4-6 years old Hours: Varies Email (541) 942-4967 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-4967 Español (541) 767-3529 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY CARE SPECIALIST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
